title: Deduplicate daily paper fetching and clean up existing md files

stories.title: Filter previously fetched papers in collect_papers()
acceptanceCriteria: collect_papers() calls load_papers_db() and uses it to filter out known paper IDs
Papers already in papers_db.json are excluded from the all_papers dict
A log message is printed showing how many duplicate papers were skipped
The within-run deduplication (existing all_papers dict check) still works
The function still returns up to TOP_N papers sorted by score

stories.title: Git commit and push the code change
acceptanceCriteria: The modified daily_briefing.py is committed to the repo
The commit is pushed to the remote origin
The commit message describes the deduplication fix

stories.title: Remove duplicate papers from existing markdown files
acceptanceCriteria: 2026-03-22.md has duplicate papers removed (all 5 were duplicates from 03-19/03-20)
2026-03-23.md has 4 duplicate papers removed, keeps only 2603.16050 (End-to-End Autonomy)
Changes committed and pushed to remote
